variants.title: Lenovo Thinkpad T14S Notebook 35.6 Cm (14") Touchscreen Full Hd Intel® Core™ I5 16 Gb Lpddr4X-Sdram 512 Gb Ssd Wi-Fi 6 (802.11Ax) Windows 10 Pro Grey 20Wm0082Us

description.plain: Intel Core i7-1165G7 (12MB Cache), 16GB LPDDR4x-SDRAM, 512GB SSD, 35.6 cm (14") Full HD 1920 x 1080 IPS Touch, Intel Iris Xe Graphics, WLAN, Webcam, Windows 10 Pro 64-bit Lenovo ThinkPad T14s. Product type: Notebook, Form factor: Clamshell. Processor family: Intel® Core™ i7, Processor model: i7-1165G7. Display diagonal: 35.6 cm (14"), HD type: Full HD, Display resolution: 1920 x 1080 pixels, Touchscreen. Internal memory: 16 GB, Internal memory type: LPDDR4x-SDRAM. Total storage capacity: 512 GB, Storage media: SSD. On-board graphics card model: Intel Iris Xe Graphics. Operating system installed: Windows 10 Pro. Product colour: Grey Raises the bar for corporate laptops Combining lightweight portability and heavyweight performance, the ThinkPad T14s Gen 2 laptop sets a new gold standard for corporate PCs. This 14" device features epic battery life, time-saving features like a fingerprint reader integrated with the power button, and biometric and AI-based security. Plus, with Intel® Evo™ vPro® certification, you get a super-responsive device that’s ready whenever you need it. Work never looked so good Whether it’s a touchscreen you prefer or a traditional display, the ThinkPad T14s Gen 2 laptop gives you a number of 14" screen choices based on your needs—and all options include thin bezels that enhance the display. Choose the low-power FHD panel for ultimate battery life, or go with the FHD wide-angle touchscreen. For refined details, increased brightness, and amazingly accurate colours, dramatic Dolby Vision™ IPS high-dynamic-range (HDR) technology is available on the 4K display. Responsive power With the Intel® Evo™ platform, the ThinkPad T14s Gen 2 laptop delivers a powerhouse combination of performance, responsiveness, battery life, and stunning visuals. With up to 11th Gen Intel® Core™ i7 vPro® processors, you can count on an exceptional experience, anywhere. Save time & boost productivity Log in and boot up with the touch of a button—the ThinkPad T14s Gen 2 laptop features a fingerprint reader that’s integrated with the power button. Or enjoy zero-touch login with the IR camera, Windows Hello, and facial recognition. Modern Standby lets you wake your system in one second and be online a second later. Plus, you can improve productivity with call-control keys, which let you easily answer, make, and disconnect from conference calls on your device by using the F9-F11 function keys. Handles whatever comes your way ThinkPad T14s Gen 2 laptops are tested against 12 military-grade requirements and more than 200 quality checks to ensure they run in extreme conditions. From the Arctic wilderness to desert dust storms, from zero-gravity to spills and drops, you can trust these laptops to handle whatever life throws your way. Prioritizing privacy & security With an updated suite of built-in ThinkShield security solutions, the ThinkPad T14s Gen 2 laptop safeguards your device and your data. Biometrics provide an extra-secure fingerprint reader that’s integrated with the power button—so you can log in and boot up instantaneously. Human-presence detection automatically locks your device when you move away, and in combination with the optional IR camera, it enables zero-touch login even from sleep. Plus, choose the PrivacyGuard display panel to ensure wandering eyes can’t see what’s on your screen. Unplug & hit the road With a starting weight of just 1.28kg, the T14s Gen 2 laptop is ideal for work on the go. It delivers epic battery life, which means you’ll likely run out of energy long before it does. But if you do run low, rapid-charge technology provides 0-80% battery capacity in just an hour—so a lunch break can easily boost your battery significantly. Cut the cord & connect Whether you’re out in the world or working from home, the T14s Gen 2 laptop keeps you connected. Speedy WiFi 6 lets you jump on crowded public platforms fast while avoiding lag-time and buffering. And with the optional 5G WWAN*, you can enjoy faster, more secure access to your network and uninterrupted video streaming. Stay connected to what matters most, no matter where you are. * Optional WWAN availability varies by region and must be configured at time of purchase; additionally, it requires a network service provider.

variants.title: Lenovo ThinkPad E14 Laptop - 35.6 cm (14") - AMD Ryzen™ 5 7535HS - 16 GB DDR5-SDRAM - 256 GB SSD - Wi-Fi 6E - Windows 11 Pro - Black

description.plain: AMD Ryzen 5 7535HS (6C/12T, 3.3/4.55GHz, 3MB L2/16MB L3), 1x 16GB SO-DIMM DDR5-4800, 256GB SSD M.2 2242 PCIe 4.0x4 NVMe Opal 2.0, 14" WUXGA (1920x1200) IPS 300nits 45% NTSC, AMD Radeon 660M Graphics, Wi-Fi 6E 11ax 2x2 + BT5.3, FHD 1080p + IR Hybrid with Privacy Shutter, Windows 11 Pro Performance, Mobility, & Value That Are Strictly Business - Productivity-enhancing processors with ample memory - Thin & light, for your work on the go - Gorgeous display & immersive audio, for a great video call experience - Easily upgraded memory & storage, to grow with you & your business Enhanced Performance for Improved Productivity Whether you’re working on multiple spreadsheets, researching and writing a term paper, or extreme coding, you’ll zip through tasks with the performance and speed of up to AMD Ryzen 7000HS processors, plus scads of expandable memory. The comfortable, easy-to-use keyboard and TrackPoint Quick Menu will keep you on task as your productivity soars. Superior Audiovisuals See everything in rich detail on the gorgeous display, with an aspect ratio perfectly suited for business apps. And Harman- and Dolby-optimized audio mean you’ll hear every sound on the stereo speakers. Great for enhanced video calls! The Power of Extreme Mobility Lightweight and thin, the ThinkPad E14 Gen 6 (14'' AMD) laptop is ideal for business travelers or anyone else looking to work away from the confines of an office or desk. Easily pack it away until you’re ready to use it, then rely on desktop-level power from this mobile beauty. Protects Your Data & Your Laptop Biometrics provide extra protection on this laptop, from the fingerprint reader to facial recognition software. ThinkShield, our comprehensive suite of security solutions, boasts discrete Trusted Platform Module (dTPM) to safeguard critical data with encryption. When it comes to security and protecting your assets, we’ve got you covered! Built to Withstand Extreme Conditions We use the US Department of Defense's MIL-STD 810H to balance reliability and durability in ThinkPad laptops. Meeting or exceeding 12 standards, 26 procedures, and 200+ quality checks ensures they run in harsh environments and conditions like Arctic wilderness, desert dust storms, extreme temps, pressure, humidity, vibration, and more. Built With Recycling in Mind We’re committed to making a positive impact on our environment. This laptop uses post-consumer content (PCC) recycled plastic in various components, including 90% in the AC adapter, 30% in the speaker enclosure, and 25% in the battery pack. Plus it’s certified ENERGY STAR 8.0, TCO 9, and packaging is 100% plastic-free, certified by the FSC®. media.alt_text: Lenovo ThinkPad X9-14 Gen 1 21QA - Intel Core Ultra 7, 32GB, 1TB SSD, Win 11 Pro

variants.title: Lenovo ThinkPad X9-14 Gen 1 21QA - Intel Core Ultra 7, 32GB, 1TB SSD, Win 11 Pro

description.plain: The Lenovo ThinkPad X9-14 Gen 1 21QA represents a pinnacle of business laptop engineering, meticulously crafted to fulfill the demanding requirements of professionals who prioritize performance, portability, and security. This model integrates cutting-edge technology with robust build quality to deliver a device that supports intensive workflows and secure data management in a compact form factor. At the core of the ThinkPad X9-14 is the Intel Core Ultra 7 - 258V processor, featuring an 8-core architecture capable of reaching speeds up to 4.8 GHz. This powerful CPU ensures rapid processing and smooth multitasking, enabling users to efficiently run complex applications, data analysis tools, and creative software without compromise. Complementing the processor is 32 GB of LPDDR5X SDRAM, which provides ample memory bandwidth and responsiveness for simultaneous execution of multiple demanding tasks, ensuring a seamless user experience across diverse professional scenarios. The device’s 14-inch OLED display is a standout component, delivering exceptional visual fidelity with a resolution of 1920 x 1200 pixels and a 16:10 aspect ratio. Covering 100% of the DCI-P3 color gamut, the screen offers vibrant, accurate colors that are essential for professionals in design, video production, and other color-critical fields. The OLED technology enhances contrast and brightness, while Dolby Vision support enriches the display with dynamic range and deeper detail, facilitating precise visual work and immersive media consumption. Additionally, the display’s impressive 90.9% screen-to-body ratio maximizes usable screen space within a sleek chassis, promoting productivity without sacrificing portability. Audio capabilities are equally advanced, featuring Dolby Atmos technology that delivers high-definition sound with spatial accuracy. The dual array microphone system and stereo speakers enable clear communication during video conferences and provide immersive audio playback for presentations and multimedia content. This ensures that every interaction and media experience meets professional standards of clarity and quality. Security is integral to the ThinkPad X9-14’s design. The inclusion of a fingerprint reader and a discrete Trusted Platform Module (TPM) 2.0 chip safeguards sensitive information and user credentials against unauthorized access. Furthermore, the laptop supports TCG Opal Encryption 2 on its 1 TB PCIe 4.0 NVMe SSD, providing an additional layer of data protection by encrypting stored files. This comprehensive security framework aligns with stringent business compliance requirements, ensuring data integrity and privacy in professional environments. Durability and user comfort are prioritized through features such as a spill-resistant keyboard and a precision touchpad, which enhance reliability and ease of use in various working conditions. The lightweight and compact design facilitates mobility for professionals who need to maintain productivity on the move, without compromising on performance or build quality. Lenovo’s commitment to sustainability is evident in the ThinkPad X9-14’s EPEAT Gold and ENERGY STAR certifications. These endorsements reflect responsible manufacturing practices and energy-efficient operation, supporting environmentally conscious business practices and reducing the device’s ecological footprint. Key Specifications: Processor: Intel Core Ultra 7 - 258V, up to 4.8 GHz, 8-core architecture Memory: 32 GB LPDDR5X SDRAM Storage: 1 TB PCIe 4.0 NVMe SSD with TCG Opal Encryption 2 Display: 14-inch OLED, 1920 x 1200 resolution, 16:10 aspect ratio, 100% DCI-P3, Dolby Vision Graphics: Intel Arc Graphics 140V Audio: Dolby Atmos, dual array microphone, stereo speakers Connectivity: Wi-Fi 7 Security: Fingerprint reader, TPM 2.0 security chip Operating System: Windows 11 Pro Certifications: EPEAT Gold, ENERGY STAR Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) Who is the Lenovo ThinkPad X9-14 Gen 1 best suited for? This laptop is designed for business professionals, creatives, and power users who require a high-performance, reliable device with advanced security and superior display quality to support demanding workflows. How does the OLED display benefit users? The OLED display provides exceptional color accuracy, deep blacks, and enhanced contrast, which are critical for tasks such as graphic design, video editing, and high-quality media consumption. What security features are included to protect data? The ThinkPad X9-14 includes a fingerprint reader, TPM 2.0 security chip, and supports TCG Opal Encryption 2 on its SSD, delivering multiple layers of protection to secure sensitive data and user credentials. Can this laptop handle demanding multitasking? Yes, the combination of the Intel Core Ultra 7 processor and 32 GB of LPDDR5X RAM allows for efficient management of multiple applications and resource-intensive workloads simultaneously. Is the ThinkPad X9-14 designed with sustainability in mind? Indeed, it holds EPEAT Gold and ENERGY STAR certifications, underscoring Lenovo’s commitment to environmentally responsible manufacturing and energy-efficient operation.
